description: Configure the 'Child Programme' to automatically classify infants as high risk based on birth weight. Ensure the 'Birth' program stage includes a 'Neonatal Risk Status' data element (Domain: Tracker, Value Type: Text, Aggregation: None). Implement a program rule named 'Low Birth Weight Trigger' that assigns the value 'High Risk' to the 'Neonatal Risk Status' data element whenever the 'Weight (g)' in the Birth stage is less than 2500. Login credentials: admin / district.
